```{r}
hi_form_pile_tally2021_day14 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day14_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day14 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day14/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day14

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day14 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day14_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day14 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day14_2021_binded_day14$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "more",
  p_cmls = 0 ,
  z_score = z_score_day14,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day14 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day14, new_row)

```

#day15
```{r}
#day15

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[15]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day15_2021_binded_day15 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day15_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day15_2021_binded_day15$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day15_2021_binded_day15$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day15_2021_binded_day15$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day15 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day15_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day15

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day15 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day15_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day15 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day15/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day15

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day15 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day15_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day15 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day15_2021_binded_day15$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.058 ,
  z_score = z_score_day15,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day15 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day15, new_row)

```

#day16
```{r}
#day16

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[16]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day16_2021_binded_day16 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day16_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day16_2021_binded_day16$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day16_2021_binded_day16$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day16_2021_binded_day16$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day16 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day16_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day16

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day16 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day16_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day16 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day16/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day16

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day16 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day16_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day16 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day16_2021_binded_day16$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "more",
  p_cmls = 0.013 ,
  z_score = z_score_day16,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day16 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day16, new_row)

```

#day17
```{r}
#day17

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[17]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day17_2021_binded_day17 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day17_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day17_2021_binded_day17$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day17_2021_binded_day17$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day17_2021_binded_day17$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day17 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day17_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day17

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day17 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day17_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day17 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day17/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day17

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day17 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day17_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day17 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day17_2021_binded_day17$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "more",
  p_cmls = 0 ,
  z_score = z_score_day17,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day17 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day17, new_row)

```

#day18
```{r}
#day18

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[18]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day18_2021_binded_day18 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day18_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day18_2021_binded_day18$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day18_2021_binded_day18$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day18_2021_binded_day18$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day18 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day18_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day18

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day18 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day18_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day18 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day18/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day18

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day18 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day18_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day18 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day18_2021_binded_day18$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.596 ,
  z_score = z_score_day18,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day18 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day18, new_row)

```

#day19
```{r}
#day19

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[19]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day19_2021_binded_day19 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day19_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day19_2021_binded_day19$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day19_2021_binded_day19$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day19_2021_binded_day19$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day19 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day19_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day19

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day19 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day19_real$count> rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day19 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day19/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day19

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day19 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day19_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day19 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day19_2021_binded_day19$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "more",
  p_cmls = 0.001 ,
  z_score = z_score_day19,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day19 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day19, new_row)

```

#day20
```{r}
#day20

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[20]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day20_2021_binded_day20 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day20_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day20_2021_binded_day20$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day20_2021_binded_day20$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day20_2021_binded_day20$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day20 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day20_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day20

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day20 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day20_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day20 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day20/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day20

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day20 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day20_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day20 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day20_2021_binded_day20$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.076 ,
  z_score = z_score_day20,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day20 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day20, new_row)

```

#day21
```{r}
#day21

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[21]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day21_2021_binded_day21 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day21_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day21_2021_binded_day21$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day21_2021_binded_day21$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day21_2021_binded_day21$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day21 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day21_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day21

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day21 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day21_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day21 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day21/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day21

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day21 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day21_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day21 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day21_2021_binded_day21$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "more",
  p_cmls = 0 ,
  z_score = z_score_day21,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day21 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day21, new_row)

```

#day22
```{r}
#day22

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[22]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day22_2021_binded_day22 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day22_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day22_2021_binded_day22$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day22_2021_binded_day22$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day22_2021_binded_day22$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day22 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day22_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day22

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day22 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day22_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day22 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day22/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day22

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day22 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day22_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day22 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day22_2021_binded_day22$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "more",
  p_cmls = 0 ,
  z_score = z_score_day22,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day22 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day22, new_row)

```

#day23
```{r}
#day23

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[23]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day23_2021_binded_day23 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day23_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day23_2021_binded_day23$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day23_2021_binded_day23$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day23_2021_binded_day23$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day23 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day23_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day23

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day23 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day23_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day23 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day23/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day23

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day23 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day23_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day23 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day23_2021_binded_day23$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "more",
  p_cmls = 0 ,
  z_score = z_score_day23,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day23 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day23, new_row)

```

#day24
```{r}
#day24

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[24]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day24_2021_binded_day24 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day24_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day24_2021_binded_day24$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day24_2021_binded_day24$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day24_2021_binded_day24$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day24 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day24_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day24

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day24 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day24_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day24 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day24/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day24

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day24 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day24_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day24 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day24_2021_binded_day24$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "more",
  p_cmls = 0 ,
  z_score = z_score_day24,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day24 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day24, new_row)

```

#day25
```{r}
#day25

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[25]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day25_2021_binded_day25 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day25_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day25_2021_binded_day25$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day25_2021_binded_day25$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day25_2021_binded_day25$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day25 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day25_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day25

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day25 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day25_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day25 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day25/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day25

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day25 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day25_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day25 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day25_2021_binded_day25$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "more",
  p_cmls = 0.028 ,
  z_score = z_score_day25,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day25 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day25, new_row)

```

#day26
```{r}
#day26

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[26]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day26_2021_binded_day26 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day26_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day26_2021_binded_day26$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day26_2021_binded_day26$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day26_2021_binded_day26$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day26 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day26_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day26

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day26 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day26_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day26 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day26/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day26

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day26 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day26_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day26 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day26_2021_binded_day26$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "more",
  p_cmls = 0 ,
  z_score = z_score_day26,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day26 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day26, new_row)

```

#day27
```{r}
#day27

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[27]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day27_2021_binded_day27 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day27_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day27_2021_binded_day27$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day27_2021_binded_day27$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day27_2021_binded_day27$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day27 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day27_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day27

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day27 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day27_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day27 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day27/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day27

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day27 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day27_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day27 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day27_2021_binded_day27$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "more",
  p_cmls = 0 ,
  z_score = z_score_day27,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day27 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day27, new_row)

```

#day28
```{r}
#day28

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[28]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day28_2021_binded_day28 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day28_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day28_2021_binded_day28$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day28_2021_binded_day28$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day28_2021_binded_day28$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day28 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day28_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day28

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day28 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day28_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day28 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day28/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day28

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day28 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day28_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day28 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day28_2021_binded_day28$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "more",
  p_cmls = 0.005 ,
  z_score = z_score_day28,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day28 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day28, new_row)

```

#day29
```{r}
#day29

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[29]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day29_2021_binded_day29 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day29_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day29_2021_binded_day29$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day29_2021_binded_day29$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day29_2021_binded_day29$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day29 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day29_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day29

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day29 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day29_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day29 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day29/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day29

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day29 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day29_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day29 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day29_2021_binded_day29$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "more",
  p_cmls = 0.003 ,
  z_score = z_score_day29,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day29 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day29, new_row)

```

#day30
```{r}
#day30

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[30]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day30_2021_binded_day30 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day30_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day30_2021_binded_day30$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day30_2021_binded_day30$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day30_2021_binded_day30$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day30 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day30_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day30

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day30 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day30_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day30 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day30/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day30

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day30 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day30_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day30 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day30_2021_binded_day30$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "more",
  p_cmls = 0.004 ,
  z_score = z_score_day30,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day30 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day30, new_row)

```

#day31
```{r}
#day31

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[31]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day31_2021_binded_day31 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day31_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day31_2021_binded_day31$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day31_2021_binded_day31$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day31_2021_binded_day31$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day31 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day31_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day31

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day31 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day31_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day31 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day31/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day31

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day31 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day31_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day31 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day31_2021_binded_day31$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "more",
  p_cmls = 0 ,
  z_score = z_score_day31,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day31 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day31, new_row)

```

#day32
```{r}
#day32

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[32]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day32_2021_binded_day32 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day32_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day32_2021_binded_day32$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day32_2021_binded_day32$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day32_2021_binded_day32$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day32 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day32_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day32

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day32 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day32_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day32 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day32/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day32

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day32 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day32_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day32 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day32_2021_binded_day32$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.129 ,
  z_score = z_score_day32,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day32 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day32, new_row)

```

#day33
```{r}
#day33

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[33]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day33_2021_binded_day33 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day33_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day33_2021_binded_day33$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day33_2021_binded_day33$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day33_2021_binded_day33$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day33 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day33_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day33

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day33 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day33_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day33 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day33/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day33

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day33 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day33_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day33 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day33_2021_binded_day33$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "more",
  p_cmls = 0 ,
  z_score = z_score_day33,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day33 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day33, new_row)

```

#day34
```{r}
#day34

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[34]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day34_2021_binded_day34 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day34_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day34_2021_binded_day34$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day34_2021_binded_day34$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day34_2021_binded_day34$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day34 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day34_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day34

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day34 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day34_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day34 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day34/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day34

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day34 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day34_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day34 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day34_2021_binded_day34$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "more",
  p_cmls = 0 ,
  z_score = z_score_day34,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day34 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day34, new_row)

```

#day35
```{r}
#day35

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[35]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day35_2021_binded_day35 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day35_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day35_2021_binded_day35$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day35_2021_binded_day35$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day35_2021_binded_day35$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day35 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day35_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day35

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day35 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day35_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day35 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day35/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day35

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day35 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day35_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day35 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day35_2021_binded_day35$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "same",
  p_cmls = 0.121 ,
  z_score = z_score_day35,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day35 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day35, new_row)

```

#day36
```{r}
#day36

current_date <- pile_dates_2021[36]
current_date



pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day36_2021_binded_day36 <- subset(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded, date == current_date)

pile_count_length_list_2021_day36_real <- subset(pile_count_length_sum_2021, date == current_date)




#put run #s in an ascending vector
cum_run_IDS <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day36_2021_binded_day36$runIDs)

#create empty vector for number of time the rules were followed to be stored
random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c()


#put the number of times the rule was followed into the vector for analysis 
for (j in cum_run_IDS) {
  len_of_piles <- length(which(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day36_2021_binded_day36$rule_followed == "yes" & 
                                       pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day36_2021_binded_day36$runIDs == j))
  
  random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 <- c(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021, len_of_piles)
}

#turn vector into a dataframe for analysis
rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021 <- data.frame(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

#plot time (the x intercept is the # of time a rule was used in the real data, found with 
#"pile_real <- length(which(pile_no_dupr$rule_followed == "yes"))
#pile_real.frame <- data.frame(pile_real))"
hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day36 <- ggplot(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021, aes(x=random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..),      
                 binwidth=5,
```
