```{r}
                 colour="black", fill="grey") +
  geom_density(lwd = 1, linetype = 1) + theme_minimal() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = pile_count_length_list_2021_day36_real$count, colour = "red", size = 2)  + theme(axis.text = element_text(size=25),  axis.title = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Count of pile events", breaks=seq(0, 200, 50)) +  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 200), ylim = c(0,.05)) +
  scale_y_continuous( breaks = seq(0, .05, .025)) 

hi_form_pile_2021_count_plot_day36

hi_form_pile_tally2021_day36 <-length(which(pile_count_length_list_2021_day36_real$count > rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021 ))



hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day36 <-   1 - hi_form_pile_tally2021_day36/length(rand_pile_.frame_hi_form_2021$random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

hi_form_ppile_tally2021_day36

#p = 
#calculate z score
#calculate mean and SD of permuted counts
mean_perm <- mean(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)
sd_perm <- sd(random_times_pile_followed_hi_form_2021)

# Calculate z-score
z_score_day36 <- (pile_count_length_list_2021_day36_real$count - mean_perm) / sd_perm


#create df to store important data for later stats and figures. to be binded later
hi_form_df_piece_day36 <- data.frame(group = integer(),
                                    bin = integer(),
                                    date =  character(),
                                    rule = character(),
                                    cmls = character(),
                                    p_cmls = integer(),
                                    z_score= integer())

 bin_for_store <- unique(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day36_2021_binded_day36$bin)



#input data to be combined into df
new_row <- data.frame(
  group = 1,
  bin = bin_for_store,
  date = current_date,
  rule = "pile",
  cmls = "more",
  p_cmls = 0.008 ,
  z_score = z_score_day36,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#bind row of data to df
hi_form_df_piece_day36 <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day36, new_row)

```


#combine days
```{r}
#bind all summary dfs to make group masterframe
hi_form_df_piece_master_piece_pile_2021_day_by_day <- rbind(hi_form_df_piece_day1,  hi_form_df_piece_day2,  hi_form_df_piece_day3,  hi_form_df_piece_day4,  hi_form_df_piece_day5,  hi_form_df_piece_day6,  hi_form_df_piece_day7,  hi_form_df_piece_day8,  hi_form_df_piece_day9,  hi_form_df_piece_day10,  hi_form_df_piece_day11,  hi_form_df_piece_day12,  hi_form_df_piece_day13,  hi_form_df_piece_day14,  hi_form_df_piece_day15,  hi_form_df_piece_day16,  hi_form_df_piece_day17,  hi_form_df_piece_day18,  hi_form_df_piece_day19,  hi_form_df_piece_day20,  hi_form_df_piece_day21,  hi_form_df_piece_day22,  hi_form_df_piece_day23,  hi_form_df_piece_day24,  hi_form_df_piece_day25,  hi_form_df_piece_day26,  hi_form_df_piece_day27,  hi_form_df_piece_day28,  hi_form_df_piece_day29,  hi_form_df_piece_day30,  hi_form_df_piece_day31,  hi_form_df_piece_day32,  hi_form_df_piece_day33,  hi_form_df_piece_day34,  hi_form_df_piece_day35,  hi_form_df_piece_day36)


#write.csv(hi_form_df_piece_master_piece_pile_2021_day_by_day,  here("ch2 data","hi_form_df_piece_master_piece_pile_2021_day_by_day.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```






#plot rule following comp to random over days
```{r}
#load dfs
#load pile_count_length_sum_2021 by running code above
pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded <- read_csv(here("ch2 data",("pile_countmaster_day_level_hi_form_2021_custom_thresh.csv")))

hi_form_df_piece_master_piece_pile_2021_day_by_day <- read_csv(here("ch2 data",("hi_form_df_piece_master_piece_pile_2021_day_by_day.csv")))

head(pile_count_length_sum_2021)
head(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded)
head(hi_form_df_piece_master_piece_pile_2021_day_by_day)

str(pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded)


#Canonical set of runs ( 1..1000 labels)
all_runs <- pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded %>%
  distinct(runIDs) %>% pull()

#Count "rule_followed == yes" per (date, runIDs); then complete to 1000 runs/day
rand_master_for_fig_pile <- pile_count_length_list_masterframe_day_2021_binded %>%
  filter(rule_followed == "yes") %>%
  select(date, runIDs) %>%
  group_by(date, runIDs) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  tidyr::complete(runIDs = all_runs, fill = list(count = 0L)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(rule = "pile")





str(pile_count_length_sum_2021)
str(rand_master_for_fig_pile)
str(hi_form_df_piece_master_piece_pile_2021_day_by_day)

#write.csv(rand_master_for_fig_pile,  here("ch2 data","rand_master_for_fig_pile.csv"), row.names = FALSE)



#Observed rule follows
obs_daily <- pile_count_length_sum_2021 %>%
  select(date, count) %>%
  rename(obs_count = count)

#Randomized stats per day (FULL RANGE)
rand_stats <- rand_master_for_fig_pile %>%
  filter(rule == "pile") %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(
    n_draws  = n(),
    min_rand = min(count, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_rand = max(count, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_rand = mean(count, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(date)

#Bottom z-scores
z_df <- hi_form_df_piece_master_piece_pile_2021_day_by_day %>%
  filter(rule == "pile") %>%
  select(date, cmls, z_score) %>%
  mutate(
    cmls = factor(
      cmls,
      levels = c("less", "same", "more"),
      labels = c("Less than random", "Same as random", "More than random")
    )
  )



#Global x-axis so both panels align
global_min <- min(c(obs_daily$date, rand_stats$date, z_df$date), na.rm = TRUE)
global_max <- max(c(obs_daily$date, rand_stats$date, z_df$date), na.rm = TRUE)
global_all_dates <- seq(global_min, global_max, by = "day")

#TOP tube + mean spine + observed, with global x
p_top <- ggplot() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = global_all_dates, linewidth = 0.25, alpha = 0.15) +
  #full-range tube
  geom_ribbon(
    data = rand_stats,
    aes(x = date, ymin = min_rand, ymax = max_rand),
    fill = "grey40", alpha = 0.18
  ) +
  #random mean rule use spine
  geom_line(
    data = rand_stats,
    aes(x = date, y = mean_rand, linetype = "Random mean"),
    linewidth = 0.9, color = "grey20"
  ) +
  # points for random mean
  geom_point(
    data = rand_stats,
    aes(x = date, y = mean_rand),
    color = "grey20", size = 1.8
  ) +
  #observed rule use line
  geom_line(
    data = obs_daily,
    aes(x = date, y = obs_count, color = "Observed"),
    linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  #Points for observed rule use
  geom_point(
    data = obs_daily,
    aes(x = date, y = obs_count, color = "Observed"),
    size = 1.8
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Random mean" = "dashed"), name = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Observed" = "#d62728"), name = NULL) +
  scale_x_date(
    breaks = global_all_dates,
    date_labels = "%b %d",
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.001, 0.001))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(global_min, global_max)) +
  labs(x = "Date", y = "Motif count",
       title = "Observed vs. randomized motif occurrences (daily)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 20) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.6),
    axis.ticks.length.x = grid::unit(3, "pt"),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.25),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
#BOTTOM z-scores, with the same global x
p_bottom <- ggplot(z_df, aes(x = date, y = z_score, fill = cmls)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = global_all_dates, linewidth = 0.25, alpha = 0.15) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Less than random" = "#d62728", "Same as random" = "grey70", "More than random" = "#2ca02c"),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    breaks = global_all_dates,
    date_labels = "%b %d",
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.001, 0.001))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(global_min, global_max)) +
  labs(x = "Date", y = "Z-score", title = "Daily difference (observed vs. random)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 20) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.6),
    axis.ticks.length.x = grid::unit(3, "pt"),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.25),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

#Stack 
(p_top / p_bottom) + patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(2, 1))




#16 by 22?

```
